items.title: Marid rebrand
items.description: The app is now fully Marid across the TUI, CLI, and web UI — new flame logo, favicon, and social card.

items.title: Total data isolation
items.description: Marid stores its data, config, and auth under its own app directory, so it runs side by side with a co-installed OpenCode without collisions.

items.title: First Marid release
items.description: Initial private distribution with the Marid gateway, isolated instances, and the Telegram channel gateway.
